metadata.description: techtrip-secondbrain: a one-command bootstrapper that stands up a generic, out-of-the-box LLM Wiki second brain (Obsidian + Claude Code + claude-obsidian) on a fresh Mac, then keeps it in sync across machines.

plugins.name: techtrip-secondbrain
plugins.description: Bootstraps a generic LLM Wiki second brain: installs Obsidian + community plugins, pulls the claude-obsidian plugin (AgriciDaniel, MIT) from TechTrip's maintained bug-fix fork, scaffolds a clean vault, wires the Obsidian MCP server, ships the yt-fetch and notebooklm-ingest source skills, and configures git sync + backup. macOS MVP. Interactive and idempotent.
